series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the administration of the Auditor of State Legal Division, including but not limited to related communications, supervisory materials, staff training, staff assignments, staff evaluations and associated records, departmental reviews, templates, process and procedure manuals, calendars, licenses, logs, bills, and reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: electronic version has been created, or no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs ; Electronic: revised, superseded, obsolete, or no longer of administrative value
